name: ChatGPT
description: The world's most popular AI chatbot by OpenAI. Conversations, coding, writing, and much more with GPT-4.
longDescription: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship conversational AI product powered by GPT-4. It can engage in nuanced conversations, write and debug code, draft essays, summarize documents, and assist with almost any text-based task. With millions of users worldwide, it remains the benchmark for conversational AI.
pricingDetails: Free plan available. ChatGPT Plus at $20/month for GPT-4 access.

name: Midjourney
description: Create stunning AI-generated artwork and images from text prompts. The leading AI image generation tool used by artists worldwide.
longDescription: Midjourney is a generative AI tool that creates images from natural language descriptions. Known for its artistic, high-quality outputs, it is widely used by designers, artists, and content creators to produce stunning visuals, concept art, and illustrations.
cons: Has a learning curve for prompts
pricingDetails: Basic plan from $10/month. Standard at $30/month.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI-powered code completion and generation tool built into your favorite editors. Write code faster with intelligent suggestions.
longDescription: GitHub Copilot is an AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style suggestions as you code. Powered by OpenAI Codex, it understands context from your code and comments to generate complete functions and modules.
pricingDetails: $10/month individual, $19/month business, free for students.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant known for being helpful, harmless, and honest. Excellent for analysis, writing, and reasoning.
longDescription: Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant built with safety at its core. It excels at long document analysis, nuanced writing, coding, and complex reasoning tasks with a massive context window for handling large documents.
pricingDetails: Free plan available. Claude Pro at $20/month.

name: Runway ML
description: Professional AI video editing and generation platform. Create, edit, and transform videos with cutting-edge AI tools.
longDescription: Runway ML is a creative suite of AI-powered tools for video editing and generation. It offers Gen-2 video generation, green screen removal, motion tracking, and many more professional-grade video tools.
pros: Many AI tools in one platform
pricingDetails: 125 free credits on signup. Plans from $15/month.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI writing assistant designed for marketing teams. Generate blogs, ads, emails, and social media content at scale.
longDescription: Jasper is an AI content creation platform built specifically for marketing teams. It helps create on-brand content at scale, from blog posts and social media to email campaigns and advertising copy.
cons: One of the more expensive options
pricingDetails: Creator plan from $49/month. Teams from $125/month.

name: Synthesia
description: Create AI videos with lifelike avatars. Turn scripts into professional videos without cameras or actors.
longDescription: Synthesia enables businesses to create professional AI videos using digital human avatars. Simply type your script and choose an avatar to generate studio-quality videos in minutes without any filming equipment.
pricingDetails: Personal plan from $22/month. Enterprise pricing available.

name: Notion AI
description: AI superpowers built right into Notion. Summarize notes, write content, find information, and automate your workspace.
longDescription: Notion AI brings artificial intelligence directly into your Notion workspace. It can write, edit, summarize, translate, and help you find information across all your notes and documents seamlessly.
cons: Limited compared to dedicated AI writing tools
pricingDetails: $10/month add-on to any Notion plan.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's latest image generation model. Create detailed, accurate images from text with remarkable prompt adherence.
longDescription: DALL-E 3 is OpenAI's most capable image generation model, available through ChatGPT and the API. It significantly excels at following detailed prompts and creating high-quality, accurate images.
cons: Limited to ChatGPT Plus for best access
pricingDetails: Included with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo). API at $0.04/image.

name: Copy.ai
description: Generate marketing copy, blog posts, social media content, and more in seconds with powerful AI writing tools.
longDescription: Copy.ai is an AI-powered copywriting platform that helps marketers and creators generate compelling content quickly. It offers 90+ tools for different content types and all marketing needs.
cons: Can be repetitive on longer content
pricingDetails: Free plan with 2,000 words/month. Pro from $36/month.

name: Grammarly
description: AI-powered writing assistant checking grammar, spelling, style, and tone. Trusted by 30 million users worldwide.
longDescription: Grammarly uses AI to help you write clearly and effectively. It goes beyond spell-checking to analyze sentence structure, word choice, tone, and plagiarism across any platform you write on.
pricingDetails: Free plan. Premium at $12/month. Business from $15/user/month.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered answer engine with real-time web search. Get accurate, cited answers to any question instantly.
longDescription: Perplexity is an AI answer engine that combines large language models with real-time web search. It provides concise, accurate answers with source citations, making it perfect for research.
pricingDetails: Free plan with daily searches. Pro at $20/month.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Hyper-realistic AI voice synthesis and cloning. Generate speech in 29 languages with unparalleled naturalness.
longDescription: ElevenLabs offers state-of-the-art AI voice technology for generating realistic speech. Clone any voice with just a few seconds of audio and produce natural-sounding voiceovers in dozens of languages.
pricingDetails: Free plan with 10,000 characters. Starter at $5/month.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source AI image generation model. Run locally or use online platforms. Thousands of community models available.
longDescription: Stable Diffusion is a powerful open-source image generation model that can run on consumer hardware. With a massive community and thousands of fine-tuned models, it is the most flexible and customizable AI image tool.
pricingDetails: Open source and free. Some cloud platforms charge for GPU time.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings automatically. Never miss a detail again.
longDescription: Otter.ai uses AI to provide real-time transcription and summaries of meetings, interviews, and conversations. It integrates directly with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams for seamless recording.
pricingDetails: Free plan with 300 minutes/month. Pro at $16.99/month.

name: Canva AI
description: AI-powered design with Magic Design, text-to-image, background removal, and powerful creative features.
longDescription: Canva AI features transform the world's most popular design platform into an even more powerful creative tool. From AI image generation to Magic Resize and intelligent design suggestions, it democratizes professional design.
cons: Less precise control than pro tools
pricingDetails: Free plan available. Pro at $12.99/month.

name: Zapier AI
description: Automate workflows between 5,000+ apps using natural language AI. Build complex automations without any coding.
longDescription: Zapier AI capabilities let you build automations using plain natural language. Describe what you want to automate and AI creates the workflow. Connect 5,000+ apps to automate your entire work life.
pricingDetails: Free plan with 100 tasks/month. Starter at $19.99/month.

name: Gemini
description: Google's most capable multimodal AI. Understands and generates text, images, audio, and code seamlessly.
longDescription: Google Gemini is a multimodal AI model available through Google products and the API. It can process text, images, audio, and video natively, and powers AI features across the entire Google ecosystem.
cons: Can be less accurate than competitors
pricingDetails: Free with Google account. Gemini Advanced at $19.99/month.

name: HubSpot AI
description: AI-powered CRM and marketing platform. Generate content, score leads, and automate customer journeys at scale.
longDescription: HubSpot AI tools are embedded throughout its marketing, sales, and service platforms. From AI content creation to predictive lead scoring and intelligent automation, HubSpot AI powers business growth.
pricingDetails: Free CRM. Marketing Hub from $800/month.

name: Surfer SEO
description: AI-powered SEO content optimization. Write and optimize content to rank higher using data-driven insights.
longDescription: Surfer SEO uses AI to analyze top-ranking pages and provides real-time guidance to create content that actually ranks. Its content editor shows exactly what keywords, headings, and structure you need.
pricingDetails: Essential plan from $89/month. Scale from $129/month.

name: Cursor
description: The AI-first code editor. Chat with your codebase, generate entire features, and fix bugs with powerful AI.
longDescription: Cursor is an AI-first code editor built on VS Code that allows developers to chat with their codebase, generate entire features from natural language descriptions, and get intelligent code explanations.
pricingDetails: Free hobby plan. Pro at $20/month. Business at $40/month.

name: Loom AI
description: Record and enhance videos with AI. Auto-generate titles, summaries, and transcripts for your recordings.
longDescription: Loom AI adds artificial intelligence to the popular async video messaging platform. It automatically generates titles, summaries, tasks, and transcripts from your recordings to save significant time.
pricingDetails: AI features on Loom Business at $12.50/seat/month.

name: Writesonic
description: AI writing platform for SEO-optimized content. Generate articles, landing pages, product descriptions fast.
longDescription: Writesonic is an AI-powered writing platform focused on SEO and marketing content. It can generate long-form articles, landing pages, product descriptions, and more with built-in SEO optimization features.
pricingDetails: Free plan with limited words. Starter from $16/month.

name: Descript
description: Edit video and podcasts like a document. Remove filler words, clone voices, and produce studio-quality content.
longDescription: Descript is a revolutionary audio and video editing tool that lets you edit media by editing text. AI features include filler word removal, voice cloning, automatic transcription, and AI-generated clips.
pricingDetails: Free plan. Creator at $24/month. Business at $40/month.

name: Beautiful.ai
description: AI-powered presentation maker. Create stunning slides automatically with smart templates and design AI.
longDescription: Beautiful.ai uses AI to help you create professional presentations automatically. Its smart templates adapt to your content, and AI design suggestions ensure your slides always look polished and professional.
pricingDetails: Pro plan at $12/month. Team at $40/month.

name: Pictory AI
description: Turn blog posts and scripts into engaging videos automatically. Perfect for content repurposing at scale.
longDescription: Pictory AI converts long-form content like blog posts, webinars, and scripts into short, engaging videos with AI. It automatically selects relevant footage, adds captions, and creates professional videos.
pricingDetails: Starter plan from $23/month. Professional at $47/month.

name: Semrush AI
description: AI-powered digital marketing suite. SEO, PPC, content, and competitive research all in one powerful platform.
longDescription: Semrush AI-powered features help marketers dominate search and outperform competitors. From AI content briefs to automated competitor analysis and keyword clustering, it is the complete marketing intelligence platform.
pricingDetails: Pro plan from $129.95/month. Guru from $249.95/month.

name: Fireflies.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and analyzes your meetings across all video platforms.
longDescription: Fireflies.ai is an AI-powered meeting assistant that joins your video calls to record, transcribe, and analyze conversations. It integrates with 40+ apps to help you capture and share meeting insights.
pricingDetails: Free plan available. Pro at $18/seat/month.

name: Murf AI
description: Professional AI voice generator with 120+ voices across 20+ languages for studio-quality voiceovers.
longDescription: Murf AI provides professional text-to-speech voices for voiceovers, presentations, explainer videos, and more. With 120+ lifelike AI voices across 20+ languages, it is a complete voiceover studio.
cons: Voice cloning on higher plans only
pricingDetails: Free plan. Creator at $23/month. Business at $66/month.

name: Bolt.new
description: AI full-stack web development in the browser. Build, run, and deploy complete web apps instantly with AI.
longDescription: Bolt.new is an AI-powered web development environment that lets you build full-stack applications directly in the browser. Powered by advanced AI, it can scaffold, write, and help deploy complete web applications from natural language descriptions.
cons: AI can make mistakes in complex code
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Pro from $20/month.
